title: Heavy Metal Blood Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
rary: Diagnostics & Testing [Internet]. Cleveland (OH): Cleveland Clinic; c2025. Heavy Metal Test; [reviewed 2022 Apr 15; cited 2025 Feb 18]; [about 6 screens]. Available from: https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/diagnostics/22797-heavy-metal-test
